name: @prosopo/vite-plugin-watch-workspace
description: Vite plugin for watching and rebuilding external files

scripts.build:tsc:cjs: echo "@prosopo/vite-plugin-watch-workspace: no tsc cjs build (source uses import.meta, which tsc cannot emit as CommonJS; use build:cjs (vite) for CommonJS output)"
scripts.build:bundle: echo "@prosopo/vite-plugin-watch-workspace: no bundle build (not supported for this package)"
scripts.build:bundle:es: echo "@prosopo/vite-plugin-watch-workspace: no es bundle build (not supported for this package)"
scripts.build:bundle:iife: echo "@prosopo/vite-plugin-watch-workspace: no iife bundle build (not supported for this package)"
scripts.build:bundle:webpack: echo "@prosopo/vite-plugin-watch-workspace: no webpack bundle build (not supported for this package)"

author: Prosopo Limited
